chunks.title: Job's Retort to Friends
chunks.reason: Job responds directly to his friends' accusations with sarcasm and a counter-claim of wisdom.

chunks.title: Argument from Nature and Age
chunks.reason: Job uses rhetorical questions about creation and the value of age to argue for God's sovereignty.

chunks.title: The Sovereignty of God
chunks.reason: A declarative section describing God's absolute power over nature, kings, and nations.
